system.description: Dynamite can be used as a deconstruction tool or a weapon, both with great effect. Dynamite attacks rely on fictional positioning. If there is anyone nearby to a target of an attack, they must also make a defense roll, but with a +1d bonus. The same applies to anyone within melee range of the target, friend or foe. If you only intend to light the fuse, that requires a Maneuver rather than a Minor action to attack.
